div1.entryFree: Termagant, an imaginary God of the Mahometans, represented as a most violent character in the old Miracle-plays and Moralities: 'twas time to counterfeit, or that hot t. Scot had paid me scot and lot too, H4A V, 4, 114. I would have such a fellow whipped for o'erdoing T.; it outherods Herod, Hml. III, 2, 15. Very impertinently substituted by M. Edd. for armgaunt of O. Edd. in Ant. I, 5, 48.
